title: Interactive news-chart overlay feature
description: Integrate news timeline data with the stock price chart on stock.html. Each major news event renders as a vertical colored line on the chart (color = category: Earnings=green, Product=blue, Governance=red, Manufacturing=purple). Hover tooltip shows headline + price at that date. Add time range selector (6M/1Y/2Y/MAX) that updates chart and markers. Ensure chart overlays are synced with the news events in data/news.json. This is the key interactive feature tying news to stock movement.
